memoryArtifacts.headline: History of Thomas de Brus (1284-1307)
memoryArtifacts.description: Sir Thomas de Brus (c. 1284 – 9 February 1307) was a younger brother and supporter of King Robert I of Scotland, in the struggle against the English conquest. He was captured by the MacDoualls at Loch …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Thomas Bruce of Annandale於1284年出生在蘇格蘭艾斯爾卡里克時，他的父親Robert de Brus 6th Lord of Annandale41歲，母親Lady Marjorie de Carrick 3rd Countess of Carrick30歲。他和Helen Erskine至少有1個兒子。他去世於1307年2月17日在英國波藍德卡萊爾享年23歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Thomas Bruce of Annandale于1284年出生在苏格兰艾斯爾卡里克时，他的父亲Robert de Brus 6th Lord of Annandale41岁，母亲Lady Marjorie de Carrick 3rd Countess of Carrick30岁。他和Helen Erskine至少有1个儿子。他去世于1307年2月17日在英国波藍德卡萊爾享年23岁。

nameMeanings.name: Bruce
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish (of Norman origin): habitational name from a place in Normandy, probably from Brix (La Manche).

History: The son of the Domesday baron, a friend of David I of Scotland, was granted by him the Lordship of Annandale in 1124, and his second son Robert became the founder of the Scottish house of Bruce. — This surname (see 2 above) is listed along with its original form Brousse in the (US) National Huguenot Society's register of qualified Huguenot ancestors.

variants.name: Brousse
meanings: French: topographic name for someone living in a scrubby area, from Old French bro(u)ce ‘thicket, brushwood’ (from Late Latin bruscia), or a habitational name from any of several places in France named Brousse. Compare Bruce and Brusse .

History: This surname is listed in the (US) National Huguenot Society's register of qualified Huguenot ancestors (along with its altered form Bruce) and also in the similar register of the Huguenot Society of South Carolina.

variants.name: Brewis
meanings: (of Norman origin): habitational name from Briouze in Orne.
(Northumberland and Durham): topographic name or nickname from Middle English breuhous ‘brewery’ (literally ‘brew house’).

nameMeanings.name: Sir
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of Simon , now rare, but more common in the Middle Ages, when it gave rise to the surnames Simms and Simpson.

variants.name: Simon
meanings: Usual English form of Simeon , borne in the New Testament by various characters: two apostles, a brother of Jesus, a Pharisee, a leper, a tanner, a sorcerer (who offered money for the gifts of the Holy Ghost, giving rise to the term simony), and the man who carried Jesus's cross to the Crucifixion.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Thomas Bruce of Annandale was born in 1284, in Carrick, Ayrshire, Scotland, his father, Robert de Brus 6th Lord of Annandale, was 41 and his mother, Lady Marjorie de Carrick 3rd Countess of Carrick, was 30. He had at least 1 son with Helen Erskine. He died on 17 February 1307, in Carlisle, Cumberland, England, at the age of 23.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Thomas Bruce of Annandale est né en 1284, à Carrick, Ayrshire, Écosse, son père, Robert de Brus 6th Lord of Annandale, avait 41 ans et sa mère, Lady Marjorie de Carrick 3rd Countess of Carrick, avait 30 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fils avec Helen Erskine. Il est décédé le 17 février 1307, à Carlisle, Cumberland, Angleterre, à l’âge de 23 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Thomas Bruce of Annandale 1284 in Carrick, Ayrshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Robert de Brus 6th Lord of Annandale 41 und seine Mutter Lady Marjorie de Carrick 3rd Countess of Carrick 30. Er hatte mit Helen Erskine mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb am 17. Februar 1307 im Alter von 23 Jahren in Carlisle, Cumberland, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Thomas Bruce of Annandale è nato il nel 1284 nel Carrick, Ayrshire, Scotland, il suo padre, Robert de Brus 6th Lord of Annandale, aveva 41 anni e il suo madre, Lady Marjorie de Carrick 3rd Countess of Carrick, aveva 30 anni. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio con Helen Erskine. Morì il 17 febbraio 1307, nel Carlisle, Cumberland, England, all'età di 23 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas Bruce of Annandaleが1284年にスコットランドエイルシュアイアカーリックで生まれた時，父Robert de Brus 6th Lord of Annandaleは41歳，母Lady Marjorie de Carrick 3rd Countess of Carrickは30歳であった。彼はHelen Erskineとの間に少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。彼は1307年2月17日にイギリスクウンバーランドカーリスルで23歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas Bruce of Annandale(이)가 1284년 스컷랜드 에이르실르 카릭에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert de Brus 6th Lord of Annandale(은)는 41세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Marjorie de Carrick 3rd Countess of Carrick(은)는 30세였다. 그는 Helen Erskine(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1307년 2월 17일 영국 c벌랜드 칼리슬일에서 23세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Thomas Bruce of Annandale nasceu em 1284, em Carrick, Ayrshire, Scotland, seu pai, Robert de Brus 6th Lord of Annandale, tinha 41 anos e sua mãe, Lady Marjorie de Carrick 3rd Countess of Carrick, tinha 30 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho com Helen Erskine. Ele faleceu em 17 de fevereiro de 1307, em Carlisle, Cumberland, Inglaterra, com 23 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Thomas Bruce of Annandale родился в 1284 г. в местности каррикк, аиршир, Шотландия, его отцу по имени Robert de Brus 6th Lord of Annandale было 41 год, а матери, которую звали Lady Marjorie de Carrick 3rd Countess of Carrick, 30. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын от Helen Erskine. Он умер 17 февраля 1307 г. в местности карлисл, кумбирланд, Англия в возрасте 23 лет.
